meta.title: International Committee on Systematics of Prokaryotes; Subcommittee on the taxonomy of Leptospiraceae: Minutes of the closed meeting, 18 September 2007, Quito, Ecuador
meta.journalTitle: International Journal of Systematic and Evolutionary Microbiology

abstractHtml:
Minute 1. Call to order.
The closed meeting was held at 17 : 20 on Tuesday 18 September 2007 at the Hotel Quito, Quito, Ecuador, in conjunction with the fifth meeting of the International Leptospirosis Society. The meeting was called to order by the Secretary, Paul Levett.

Minute 2. Record of attendance.
The members present were Ben Adler, Rudy Hartskeerl and Paul Levett (Secretary). Roderick Chappel was in attendance as an observer.
